dj_text: THIS IS NOT A DRILL! Bring Det På "Ring Til Politiet" (Officiel Music Video)!  Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: Are you still listening? Good. Don't touch that dial. Or do. We literally can't stop you. You're in control.

recovery_text: We're back from the void. Don't touch that dial.
title: Bring Det På "Ring Til Politiet" (Officiel Music Video)
